changelog:
QuickView pre-release v6.25.2.1

* Introduced a custom print dialog to replace the native Windows Photo Printing Wizard.
* Added support for grayscale and poster tiling modes. (#220)
* Optimized binary size.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/justnullname/QuickView/compare/v6.24.0.0...v6.25.2.1
